rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: “The Canon”: ʾƎmmabo ṗāṗās ʾāw ʾeṗisqoṗos ʾāw qasis … (MQ II, §62; DMEthLit II, §62)
Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse za-qǝddus Bāsǝlyos“The order of liturgy of St Basil” (cp. MQ II, §§ 11-16; DMEthLit II, §11-16)
Ṣalot za-qǝddus Gorgoryos “Prayer of St Gregory”
Ṣalot gǝbʾāta manṭolāʿt za-qǝddus Bāsǝlyos” / “Prayer of St Basil: the Entering of the Curtain”
Ten prayers over the vessels of the Church
Directives for the ministers, “The order of liturgy”: Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse za-yǝqeddes kāhǝn yǝqum ba-fǝrhāt. Maqdamä kʷǝllu yǝsgǝd qǝdma tābot mǝʿǝra…
Ṣalot lāʿla masob “Prayer over the Basket”
Ṣalot lāʿla mabāʾ “Prayer over the offering (to God)”
Tǝʾǝzāza ʾabawina ḥawāryāt “The command of our fathers the Apostles”
Prayers of the solemn censing (cp. MQ III, §100 – IV, §§ 30)
Ceremonial washing of the hands (the Lavabo) (cp. MQ IV, §§46-48)
Ṣalota ʾammǝḫa za-Bāsǝlyos “Prayer of the Kiss (of Peace) of Basil” (MQ IV, §§52-61)
Anaphora of Our Lady by St Cyriacus of Behnesa
